#hiring, Gen AI Engineer Hyderabad (onsite)

Hi all,

Please find the below Job Opportunity and if you are interested please share your updated resume on
 hr@sunbirditsolutions.com

Role: Gen AI Engineer
Location: Hyderabad (onsite)
Experience : 3+
Contract Duration: 6+ months

Mandatory Skills : AI/ML, GenAI ,
Agentic AI / AI agents
o 3+ years of hands-on experience in Python development
o RAG architectures
o Tool calling and MCP (Model Context Protocol)
o Experience with Lang Chain or similar GenAI frameworks.

🚨 GlobalLogic is Hiring!! 🚨
Freshers Hiring | Remote Opportunity | 3-Month Contract | Non-IT Role 💼✨

Looking to kickstart your career with a Work From Home opportunity? 🏠💻
Here’s a great chance for fresh graduates to enter the growing world of AI/ML industry 🌐🤖

🔥 GlobalLogic is hiring for the role of Associate Analyst
This is a Non-IT / Non-Technical role, making it a perfect opportunity for freshers who want to gain valuable industry experience and build a strong career foundation 📈

✅ Role: Associate Analyst (Direct Contract)
✅ Experience: 0 – 1 Years (Freshers can apply)
✅ Location: Remote 🌍
✅ Duration: 3 Months Contract
✅ Training: No prior experience required – training will be provided 🎓

✨ A great opportunity to learn, grow, and get exposure to the AI/ML domain even without a technical background.

📩 Interested candidates, DM me or comment “Interested” below!
I’ll share the details. 🤝
